prompt: Run Stage 2 deep analysis on dashboard performance task. Updated skill with external critic, strict templates, and handoff document.

assertions.text: system-analysis.md identifies sequential chart loading in analytics/service.go
system-analysis.md identifies unused cache module in internal/cache/
system-analysis.md identifies frontend rendering issue (no downsampling, all charts render simultaneously)
Critique Review section in each artifact contains actual critic findings
stage-2-handoff.md was created with all required sections
stage-2-handoff.md System Map table lists specific modules with paths
stage-2-handoff.md Risks table includes specific risks with likelihood/impact
